TextENGNew: I headed down the stairs and looked into the dimly lit living room. Mom and Dad were there, gazing at the TV screen.
Mom was holding an unpeeled apple, not looking my way. And Dad was watching the TV with a crestfallen look on face. Either he didn't notice me either, or he was just ignoring me.
The evening news was on. A male reporter on the screen pointed to the country road behind her while continuing her explanation in a slightly agitated tone.

"Hello, I'm live at the scene. This afternoon, the body of a woman was found on a rural road inside the mountains of Gifu prefecture. Her age is estimated between 70 and 90 years old, her height is approximately 150 cm."
"The police have released a statement suggesting that the body was abandoned after being killed. They are currently confirming the identity of the victim......"
Right then, the television shut off. After that, the room fell silent... and filled with a heavy atmosphere.
I felt bewildered as I tried to collect my thoughts on the story from the news. ...Grandma's corpse had finally been found.
But... why? I never thought they would find it so quickly...!
...How many days had it been...? I'd already forgotten.
It felt like it was only yesterday... yet it also felt like it was ages ago.
That day...... as I came home from school and opened the front door, a foul odor caught me off guard.
I almost choked after unintentionally inhaling it, then grimaced as I began examining the inside of the house.
"...What is this...?"
I suspiciously headed toward the source of the smell, then I heard a noise from the bathroom that sounded like shaving ice.
Wondering what was happening in there, I opened the glass door... and took a look inside.
I gasped, stepped back, then stumbled and collapsed to the floor.

...There, I saw Mom straddling over Grandma's body like she was riding a horse, raising a kitchen knife overhead, repeatedly thrusting it into Grandma's stomach, blood splattering all over her as she did...!
"......Welcome home, Natsumi..."
She was glaring at me.
Mom turned her blood-soaked face toward me and stared at me with an ominous light in her eyes. Not a single trace of sanity remained there.
"...Isn't it obvious...?"
Mom cocked her head in confusion as she looked at me... and laughed.
Why did she kill her...? The reason turned out to be rather trivial.
Grandma's ritualistic praying since this morning had been getting on Mom's nerves.
So she yelled at her to stop it, but Grandma said some harsh things in response... They must have gotten carried away and it came to this.

"...There was no choice.@k@vS04/00/310600100. The neighbors would have found out we are from Hinamizawa if things stayed the same...@k@vS04/00/310600101. Even you wouldn't like be stared at like a freak because of Grandma's eccentric behavior... don't you agree?"

...Mom had clearly come up with an excuse in hindsight, but I saw right through her from the very beginning. She hadn't sympathized with Grandma from the start, which snowballed into murderous intent when tempers grew too high, and she killed her with that knife. That must be how it happened.
Still, there was no turning back... not if I wanted to protect the life I'd built until now.
If someone found out, Mom would also be taken away from this house.
...So once Dad came home that night, we convinced him to hide Grandma's body in the mountains......
Driving through the dark mountains with Dad, we searched for a secluded, unfamiliar place...
"...We can't go back to our normal lives if Grandma's body is found.@k@vS04/00/310600103. ...So we have to hide it somewhere it will never be found... Understand?"
After receiving those intimidating instructions from Mom, I continued walking with a flashlight in hand, desperately thinking of a hiding place that would never be found.
And, while thinking scary thoughts... while feeling uneasy... while being crushed by guilt, my whole family buried Grandma's body in the ground......
And yet... for all that...!
We went to hide her in spite of the fear and sorrow we felt at the time... but was it all in vain......?
Filled with despair, I collapsed on the spot. ...Dad kept his head lowered. ...Mom set down the remote control, then slowly turned her eyes away from the TV and back to me.
"What's the meaning of this... Natsumi?"
"I'm asking you why it was found..."
"I-I don't know...!@k@vS04/36/310101014. T-there's no way I could..."
Bang!
Mom slammed the table while rising to her feet. The ashtray resting there was launched to the floor.
"Like hell you don't know!@k@vS04/00/310600107. We all got rid of it together, didn't we?@k@vS04/00/310600108. I won't let you say you forgot!"
"M-Mom..."
"...But there was a traitor in our family.@k@vS04/00/310600110. Isn't that so?@k@vS04/00/310600111. Am I wrong?!"

"You placed her by the roadside on purpose so she'd easily be found!@k@vS04/00/310600113. Someone here chose to hide Grandma in a place that would be discovered right away! Isn't that how it is?!@k@vS04/00/310600114. ...Natsumi...?"
I took a breath and froze. I had realized that she was implicating me as the "traitor."
"I-it's not me.@k@vS04/36/310101017. I really don't know!@k@vS04/36/310101018. Seriously, I don't know anything...!"
"You're still playing dumb?!"
"Kyaaa?!"
Mom grabbed the fallen ashtray and smacked me with it. The ashes covered my face, and I suddenly started coughing.
"If it's not you, then who the hell are you saying it is?!@k@vS04/00/310600117. Who else could have done it but you?!@k@vS04/00/310600118. Come on, answer me!@k@vS04/00/310600119. Come ooon!!"
It's, it's... not me!
I don't know anything! I can't answer! There's no way I can answer...!!
Seeking help, I looked to Dad. ...However, Dad kept his head hung, avoiding eye contact with everyone.
"...H-hey, Dad?@k@vS04/36/310101024. I did it properly, didn't I?@k@vS04/36/310101025. Isn't that right?@k@vS04/36/310101026. Isn't it?"

"Stop it!@k@vS04/00/310600121. Grow up already! Stop begging him for help!@k@vS04/00/310600122. Do you think it's right to be so dependent on other people?!@k@vS04/00/310600123. Give me a break!@k@vS04/00/310600124. Your father wouldn't possibly do something like that!!"
"Who else besides you would do such a stupid thing and drive the family in a tight spot?!@k@vS04/00/310600126. ...Well?!"
Mom very slowly smiled at Dad.
That smile was cold and intimidating... Threatening was the word that best matched its appearance.
"What do you think?!"
"Uh...... oh, ummm..."
Dad nodded powerlessly. When I saw that, I felt abandoned and wanted to cry.
...I can't believe it! Dad, why are you doing this? Why are you lying?! I haven't done anything. It wasn't me who put Grandma in a place that was easy to find!
The one who did that... was you Dad, wasn't it?!
"H-hold on, Dad?@k@vS04/36/310101028. Say it isn't so!@k@vS04/36/310101029. Right? Right?!"
"Natsumi... you understand?@k@vS04/00/310600130. You must remember.@k@vS04/00/310600131. You did all of this yourself.@k@vS04/00/310600132. Killing Grandma, abandoning her in the mountains..."
In shock, I opened my eyes.
Wh... what are you talking about, Mom?! Where did this come from?!

"Like I said... Natsumi.@k@vS04/00/310600134. You did all of that yourself.@k@vS04/00/310600135. ...Isn't that so?@k@vS04/00/310600136. That must be the case.@k@vS04/00/310600137. So it's all your fault... right...?!"
"W-why are you saying this?!@k@vS04/36/310101032. A lie! You're lying!@k@vS04/36/310101033. Because when I came home from school, you had already taken care of Grandma and..."
"......You're wrong.@k@vS04/00/310600139. Please think back.@k@vS04/00/310600140. You were the one who killed Grandma."
It wasn't me! I didn't do it!
Mom is the one who did it, right? ...Right?! Why is she saying it was me?!

"......Families are supposed to cover for one another.@k@vS04/00/310600142. Isn't that right?@k@vS04/00/310600143. ...Isn't it?@k@vS04/00/310600144. In that case, you need to cover for your family too."
Mom looked at me, wearing a cold smile on her face. ...It was the same ice-cold smile she'd threatened Dad with earlier.
I... I don't understand......!
What is Mom saying...? What's she trying to do? I don't get it any of it!!
"If the whole family is going to get in trouble for this...@k@vS04/00/310600146. You'll turn yourself into the police on behalf of the whole family, Natsumi."
"...All by yourself.@k@vS04/00/310600148. ......You'll be sacrificed for the sake of our family, as punishment for betraying us."
"W-why are you doing thiiis?!"
I stared straight into Mom's eyes.
But I couldn't sense anything. It was as if there was no life inside them. And no matter how tearfully I pleaded to her, Mom just looked at me with an eerie expression loosely resembling a smile.
"No...@k@vS04/36/310101038. No, Mom...@k@vS04/36/310101039. Please, what are you saying?@k@vS04/36/310101040. I don't know what you mean.@k@vS04/36/310101041. Please... Dad...?"
I looked pleadingly at Mom and Dad. However, Mom still had the same smile, and Dad remained silent like usual.
Tears continued flowing down my face.
Why? Why is this happening? Tell me!
They're supposed to be my irreplaceable family! My kind Mom, my gentle Dad... I loved them! So why are they doing this?!
"...Nooo... guh... hiii...!"
"Natsumi......?"

Mom suddenly grabbed my wrist and held it tight. And with her other hand, she turned me around so violently that I thought my jaw would dislocate.... Then she shot a strong, piercing gaze straight into my eyes.

"You're the one who did those stupid things.@k@vS04/00/310600152. ...We finally left the countryside in Okinomiya, got the home we always wanted, and were all living happily here!@k@vS04/00/310600153. We were happy here!!"

"...When Grandma died, deep down you were pleased, weren't you?@k@vS04/00/310600155. You were grateful to me, weren't you?!@k@vS04/00/310600156. Why are you destroying that?!@k@vS04/00/310600157. ...Why, why do you have so little regard for your parents?!"
"Kyaaa!!"
Mom violently tossed me and I hit the wall hard... For a moment, the pain left me unable to breathe. Then she slowly walked toward me, looking down on me with a ferocious expression on her face.
"...Haruko, you..."
"Stay out of this!!"
Mom glared demonically at Dad. It seemed like Dad was trying to step in, but he lost his nerve after that... and withdrew his raised hand.
Mom staunchly kicked me in the stomach. A dull pain ran through my abdomen, leaving me no choice but to curl up while holding my stomach. I started to feel nauseous, but I was able to hold it back.
"A bad child who betrayed her family should, obviously, be punished by society....@k@vS04/00/310600160. by the police, of course."
Mom delivered another kick to my abdomen.
"But... before society can do it, the family must punish this bad child.@k@vS04/00/310600162. School, society, and home are the three areas of education, right?"
Mom kicked me in the abdomen yet again. ...This is insane. A punishment would be forcing me to wear wet clothes! This is just an excuse for assault, plain and simple...!
This isn't Mom...! This isn't something Mom would do...!!
This nightmarish reality was making me sick, my consciousness was gradually fading away... even the screams were getting quieter.
Help...!
Someone... I don't care who, help me, help...!!
I haven't done anything...! I haven't done anything wrong!
So why... why is this only happening to me...?!
Someone... someone please help meee!!
......At that moment.
Mom... suddenly stopped moving.
"Please stop this, Haruko..."
It was Dad... grabbing Mom's hand to stop her.@k And then,
"......It was me.@k@vS04/00/310700030. I was the one who put it back there..."
Dad's voice silenced the living room. Mom turned around and panted as she waited for Dad to continue.
"...What was that...?@k@vS04/00/310600166. What... do you mean by that?!"
"......I'm sorry.@k@vS04/00/310700032. But Haruko, Natsumi... I won't let you two suffer.@k@vS04/00/310700033. ...I'll take responsibility for everything."
"I should be able to make it in time if I go now.@k@vS04/00/310700035. ...I'll turn myself in to the police."
Mom violently shook away the hand that was holding her, then clenched her fist and trembled with anger. However, Dad stood firm and showed no fear... He calmly continued in a resolute tone.

"...Don't be angry, everything will be all right.@k@vS04/00/310700037. ...Maybe they'll believe I did all this on my own?@k@vS04/00/310700038. Haruko and Natsumi had nothing to do with it.@k@vS04/00/310700039. All of you are unrelated to this.@k@vS04/00/310700040. ...Well, how does that sound?"
"...Poor thing... You've gone through a lot...@k@vS04/00/310700042. ...I'm sorry, Natsumi."
Dad took me into his arms to cheer me up. He lifted me up to support me, and tears again began to fall from my eyes.
"Dad...@k@vS04/36/310101053. No...@k@vS04/36/310101054. All I want is to just be happy, that's all..."
Living happily with all of my family... it was such a difficult thing.
I didn't want anything special. I just wanted to keep enjoying every day... so why had things come to this...?!
"Natsumi... Everything will be all right."
Dad knelt down and hugged me tightly.
"I've been thinking for a long time.@k@vS04/00/310700045. About what I should do.@k@vS04/00/310700046. ...I was constantly thinking... about how we could live happily as a family like we used to."
"But things have been steadily getting worse, and your Dad has been unable to do anything about it.@k@vS04/00/310700048. ...I didn't have the courage."
"...What happened to Grandma is also my responsibility.@k@vS04/00/310700050. It all happened because your Dad couldn't stand firm and..."
Dad stopped speaking there and lowered his head apologetically.
Dad was suffering from guilt all this time. ...Believing he should care about his family more than anyone, but being unable to do anything for us. Dad always blamed himself for being cowardly...
Now that I knew how he'd felt, I felt a little sorry for him.
"Putting Grandma's body in an easy to find location... was Dad's decision.@k@vS04/00/310700052. And now I'll explain it to Mom so she'll understand it properly."
"Now it's my turn to be brave and protect the family.@k@vS04/00/310700054. ...I put the body in an place where it'd be found on purpose. So I could give myself the last push I needed."
"It's all right, Natsumi.@k@vS04/00/310700056. It will be all right now.@k@vS04/00/310700057. Dad... is not going to run away from this."
While crying, I buried my face into Dad's chest. ...This really was Dad, after all. A kind and strong man who cared about the family from the bottom of his heart...

"Haruko, do you understand?@k@vS04/00/310700059. ...You see now? I'll take the heat to pay for this sin.@k@vS04/00/310700060. Of course, all you have to do is pretend you don't know anything.@k@vS04/00/310700061. And as soon as I've atoned, I'll come home again and we can live happily as a family..."
Dad turned to Mom and offered her a gentle gaze brimming with hope for the distant future. Looking at that, Mom smiled for a moment. However,
"...It's too late..."
She spat out those words.
"Haruko...@k@vS04/00/310700063. With things how they are, there is absolutely no way we will be happy.@k@vS04/00/310700064. Please understand."
"People most certainly cannot find happiness when they're hiding a dark secret like this that goes against their conscience.@k@vS04/00/310700066. ...Wouldn't you agree, Natsumi?"
I firmly looked back at Dad. ...But I didn't know how to answer.
I understood that Dad was speaking the truth. ...But Dad. Is it really ok to say that?
Right now, Mom was... acting strange. She wasn't in her right mind no matter how you looked at it. Trying to persuade her might be fruitless. Could she really understand Dad's heartfelt words...?
I wanted to tell Dad as much. However, I couldn't bring myself to say it with Mom standing beside us. I wanted to communicate my feelings to Dad, and as I continued staring into his eyes,
"Natsumi, it's all right.@k@vS04/00/310700069. Just leave the rest to Dad."
Dad smiled gently, the look in his eyes seemingly conveying to me he understood everything. I felt the warmth of his strong will and thought that I could rely on his courage.
"...It's all right, Natsumi."
After saying that, Dad slowly nodded.
...Hey, Dad. ...Can I really believe in you? ...Can I truly, honestly count on you?
"It's ok, Natsumi.@k@vS04/00/310700071. Leave the rest to Dad.@k@vS04/00/310700072. If you and Haruko can go back to your lives the way before, then...@k@vS04/00/310700073. Guah?!"
...Before Dad could finish...
Blood splattered into the air... A splash of red hit my eyes...
A bright red filter covered my line of sight!
And right when globs of liquid began gushing from Dad's mouth before my very eyes... I spotted the tip of a knife sticking through his throat.

I gawked in horror at the bizarre presence behind Dad. Mom was right there, holding a kitchen knife dripping with blood... She stood arrogantly, looking down at Dad... who had been moving, talking and breathing just a moment ago...
"Aah... Aaah..."
I couldn't speak.
It'd all happened so suddenly that I couldn't cry, speak, or even breathe.
Dad... No way... Is he dead...?
I looked at Dad as he suddenly fell down in front of me.
I couldn't stop trembling. My heart was screaming at me to get out of this place... but my legs wouldn't budge, as though they were no longer my own.
Even so, I tried to move my hands using all my strength... but then I heard a sniffling sound overhead and fearfully looked up.
"......It's your Dad's fault..."
Mom's voice trembled with tears.
"It's all your Dad's fault!!"
Mom spoke in a rough voice, seeming to push all her anger onto the people in front of her. Her long and beautiful hair swayed to and fro, and her face was warped with a demonic expression.

"It's not my fault.@k@vS04/00/310600178. It's all your Dad's fault!@k@vS04/00/310600179. Just when things were finally going well again!@k@vS04/00/310600180. Just when that pest was finally gone! Just when our lives were finally going back to normal!"
"Th-that's...!"
"It's everyone else's fault.@k@vS04/00/310600182. It's everyone else's fault for not cooperating."

"Making a racket about Oyashiro-sama's curse, dumping corpses in easy to find locations.@k@vS04/00/310600184. .........Everyone... my family is holding me back!@k@vS04/00/310600185. It's their fault! It's all my family's fault!"
"Kyaaaa!!"
Mom grabbed ahold of my hair. The hair that Grandma used to tie every day, my lovely hair.
That hair was being clamped down by Mom, roughly handled like it was about to be torn out.
"Th-that hurts!@k@vS04/36/310101071. M-Mom... that hurts!!"

"Why?!@k@vS04/00/310600187. Why do you hold me back?!@k@vS04/00/310600188. Even though we're a family...!@k@vS04/00/310600189. Even though we're a family!@k@vS04/00/310600190. Even though we were......... a family!"
Mom tossed me away after screaming that. Some of the hair she was clutching tore out, and several strands fell to the floor in a bunch.
Enduring the pain in my head and shoulder, I grimaced and raised my head... then froze up. Mom was right there, holding the kitchen knife... and laughing maniacally.
"People praised me.@k@vS04/00/310600192. For my beautiful hair.@k@vS04/00/310600193. They were envious of my white skin."
"...The neighbors praised me.@k@vS04/00/310600195. They praised my beautiful clothes when they saw me wearing a new dress. They noticed when I got my hair cut and told me it suited me."

"Discussing trendy topics, having fun every day...@k@vS04/00/310600197. I though my dream of living harmoniously with my family in such a wonderful place... had come true.@k@vS04/00/310600198. I'd dreamed of this life forever..."
Mom's eyes looked intoxicated while she said that in a trance. As if she had completely forgotten that Dad was bleeding out right in front of her.
What... what was this person talking about?!
She's the one who did this to Dad! Dad, who she was so close to! Dad, who said she normally wasn't honest, but she loved us very much!
And what's more... she did such horrible things to her own mother!!
And yet she was going on about family?! Who would ever believe that?!
I'm scared...! This is scary, scary, s c a r y...!!
This person isn't my Mom...! No, no, she's... she's not even human anymore...!!
"That never would have come to pass in our old town.@k@vS04/00/310600200. It was only when we moved here that my dream came true..."

"I was as good as invisible there.@k@vS04/00/310600202. I was a member of the "Kimiyoshi family."@k@vS04/00/310600203. ...That's all.@k@vS04/00/310600204. Whether it was me or not, everyone was the same.@k@vS04/00/310600205. ...Nobody really saw me for myself."
"But this city is different!@k@vS04/00/310600207. I belong here!@k@vS04/00/310600208. I wanted to live happily here!@k@vS04/00/310600209. .........But now it's all gone up in smoke!"
Bang!
Mom stomped her feet in disgust. All I could do was curl up in fear.
"Mother acted on her own and ruined my life!@k@vS04/00/310600211. She did something selfish and got in my way!"
"...Surrender to the police?@k@vS04/00/310600213. Ahahahaha!@k@vS04/00/310600214. There's only so far a joke can go.@k@vS04/00/310600215. The police understand nothing about my happiness."
"Everyone is my enemy!@k@vS04/00/310600217. Enemy! Enemy! Enemy!"
Mom's hateful voice echoed throughout the room.
Enemy, enemy, enemy. ...Enemy.
"Nobody in my family made any effort to make me happy.@k@vS04/00/310600219. Since nobody was willing to get their hands dirty, I did it."
"...And what do I get?!@k@vS04/00/310600221. Not even a single word of gratitude!"
"Didn't you think it was for the best when Grandma died?@k@vS04/00/310600223. Weren't you relieved?"

"Grandma chanted those creepy incantations and conducted those ceremonies...@k@vS04/00/310600225. Because of that, we got funny looks from the neighbors...@k@vS04/00/310600226. Didn't everyone hate it?!"

"You were what?!@k@vS04/00/310600228. Why?!@k@vS04/00/310600229. I'm not the one who killed her.@k@vS04/00/310600230. So why didn't everyone cooperate?!@k@vS04/00/310600231. Why won't you let me go back to my normal life?!"
Mom incited her anger and resentment with a kitchen knife in hand. My face was wet with tears, but I wasn't sure if I felt angry or sad.
Insane... Mom's gone insane! What was this family she was talking about?!
Was my Mom the kind of person who could say such selfish things with a straight face? No! This isn't my Mom!!
"...Uuu... uuuu! Uuu...!!"
Overwhelmed with sorrow, tears began welling up.
I wasn't entirely sure what was so sad.
However, every time I thought about the things I cherished being gone forever, tears dribbled down from both my eyes nonstop, leaving a number of stains on the floor.
What I cherish most was... my gentle, irreplaceable family.
So kind... so warm... my family always acted like a single unified heart when we were together... that's how it should have been...!!
After I came to my senses and turned back to her, Mom looked at me with a serious expression.
"Are you also... an enemy...?"
Mom, what are you saying...? I don't know what you mean!
Why am I your enemy?! I haven't done anything! I haven't done anything, so why?!
"You are... an enemy, aren't you?@k@vS04/00/310600236. A child that keeps me from my happiness...!@k@vS04/00/310600237. Unforgivable!@k@vS04/00/310600238. You're my enemy too!"
"N... Noooo!!"
I broke off running with that scream. I quickly escaped to Grandma's room.
"...Natsumi.@k@vS04/00/310600240. You don't have to run away, Natsumi..."
Mom called my name in a sweet and gentle voice, slowly walking with the kitchen knife.
N-no... Don't come any closer, Mom...
Mom crossed the doorway into Grandma's room.
Rrriiing... rrriiing...
From far away... I heard the ear-grating ringing of the telephone.
"Natsumi, you hate me, don't you?@k@vS04/00/310600242. You resent me for killing Grandma, don't you?@k@vS04/00/310600243. That's why you can't let me be happy.@k@vS04/00/310600244. Isn't that so?"

"I know it all.@k@vS04/00/310600246. Heheheh.@k@vS04/00/310600247. But you know, Natsumi.@k@vS04/00/310600248. When it comes to you...@k@vS04/00/310600249. I also...@k@vS04/00/310600250. hated you...!"
Mom had the kitchen knife in hand. ...But I couldn't look her in the face.
Rrriiing... rrriiing...
"Help...!@k@vS04/36/310101081. Help me... someone, help me...!!"
My eyes were overflowing with tears, but I tried to hold them in with my hand. ...Just then, a leaf fell on that hand.
I looked up and noticed that the sakaki trees decorating the shrine were falling apart.
...Almost like a sign that Oyashiro-sama had given up on protecting us without Grandma's desperate prayers to him...
"I despise you...@k@vS04/00/310600252. Abhor you..."
While Mom was deliriously muttering those things, I was frantically thinking.
Rrriiing... rrriiing...
Rrriiing... rrriiing...
I frantically thought to myself while staring at the ringing telephone.
...What did I do wrong? How did it come to this? What sin did I commit?!
When? What? Why? How come?!
Rrriiing... rrriiing...
...Did I anger Oyashiro-sama by moving here? Was this my punishment for hating it when Grandma forced me to pray to Oyashiro-sama?
...Or was it because I didn't believe in Oyashiro-sama...?!
"...I'm sorry..."
I apologized.
"I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry..."
If I did something wrong, then I'm sorry.
I had no idea what wrongdoing I'd committed or what I'd done. But... if an apology could end all of this, I'd apologize as many times as needed.
Mom... Forgive me...
So stop this already... Mom... Mom!
"I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry...!!"
I knelt down and rubbed my head along the floor.
Please forgive me already. Mom. Mom. Mom...
Rrriiing... rrriiing...
The sound of the telephone ringing drowned out my apologies.
"Natsumi...@k@vS04/00/310600254. That's enough."
When I raised my head, Mom had returned to her usual gentle smile.
"It'll all be over in a second...@k@vS04/00/310600256. Don't be afraid... Don't be afraid...@k@vS04/00/310600257. ...It'll just be a single moment!"
Mom raised the kitchen knife. Then she began to swing it down toward my head.
The knife covered in Dad's blood that even had bits of meat sticking from it was now seeking my blood...!!
"N-noooooooo!!"
In desperation, I used the last of my strength to dodge it. I threw myself into a narrow opening and rushed out. Then, unable to catch my breath, I raced to the phone by the front door.
Rrriiing... rrriiing...
...It was still ringing!
When I grabbed the receiver, I cried out without listening for the other person's voice.
"Somebody, heeeelp!!!"
Then I hung up the receiver and dashed down the hallway at full speed.

I almost tripped on my feet, but this was no time to fall. With a bit of a stagger, I continued running, turned around the corner, pretended to go up the stairs, then dove into the next room and locked the door behind me.
...I hoped Mom would think I ran upstairs towards the veranda and escaped outside.
I desperately held my breath while holding down the locked doorknob.
So that Mom wouldn't find me! Please, don't...!
Thump, thump, thump...
I could hear the sound of my heartbeat, surprisingly loud.
So loud, I begin to wonder if Mom could also hear it.
Someone, help...! Please, God! Anyone! Help me...!
"......Kimiyoshi?"
I heard a familiar voice.
A loving, gentle voice that brought back memories...
"...What happened, Kimiyoshi?!"
...Why was Toudou-kun here?! How was I hearing his voice?!
No, don't tell me he came over to my house...!?
"Kimiyoshi...?@k@vS04/39/310200218. Hey, Kimiyoshi... what happened?@k@vS04/39/310200219. Are you all right?!"
A voice shuddering with fear and tension desperately called out my name.
No doubt about it. I didn't understand why, but Toudou-kun had come to my house!
...Dad was dead, and Mom was chasing me around the house with a kitchen knife!
"...Stay away, Toudou-kun!"
I hastily unlocked the door and opened it up.
Slam...!
I heard a dull sound... at almost that exact same time.
Toudou-kun was lying on the ground, with Mom looking down at him.
She held the base of a broken urn in her hand, and Toudou-kun was collapsed on the floor with blood dripping down his head...
"To-Toudou, kun...!!"
"...Oh, Natsumi...?@k@vS04/00/310600259. That's where you were.@k@vS04/00/310600260. I was looking for you, you know...?"
With a smirk, Mom looked at me.
The moment I saw that... the restraints within me came unleashed, and my heart and mind suddenly went quiet.
At this rate... I'm not the only one who will die here.
Toudou-kun... and I will be killed here together.
...No way! That's unacceptable...!
In that case... I......!!
My erratic breathing began to stabilize.
...I no longer looked at Mom with fear. My heart was filled with emotions that transcended that...!
"......Stop this..."
"Don't kill anyone else...!"
She even got Toudou-kun mixed up in this...
He didn't know a thing and wasn't involved, yet she did this to him! She'd pay! She'd pay for putting the boy I loved through this...!
You'll pay for this, Mom!!
"He stuck his nose in at the wrong time.@k@vS04/00/310600263. So..."
Mom reached for the kitchen knife sitting on the desk. Noticing that, I immediately lunged toward it.
I won't let Mom grab that knife!
I reached for the kitchen knife too. ...But Mom snatched it a moment sooner, and raised it overhead.
The tip of the knife grazed my cheek. Still, I continued resisting, desperately clinging to Mom's arms.
"Let me go, Natsumi!@k@vS04/00/310600265. You little... Let me go!!"
"Not a chance...@k@vS04/36/310101098. Stop this already...!@k@vS04/36/310101099. Come on, stop it...!@k@vS04/36/310101100. Mom, I won't let you kill anyone else!"
I remained firm no matter how much she jeered and yelled at me. Then, I reached out for the hilt of the knife and grabbed Mom's hand, gripping it tight.
Her hands were bloody and slippery. That didn't matter. I firmly grasped Mom's bony fingers with both of my hands, digging my nails into her...!
"Damn you... Natsumiii!!"
...No. No matter what happens, I won't let Mom take that knife!
Enough is enough! Let's end this right here!!
"Dammn youuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu!!!"
"Guh... uuu!!"
We grappled with one another, scrambling hard to get ahold of the knife. The edge swung precariously back and forth between Mom and myself many times, while the blade gleamed.
"Natsumi!!@k@vS04/00/310600269. Stop this at once!!"
"I can't bear any more... No more!@k@vS04/36/310101103. Stop it, Mom!@k@vS04/36/310101104. Stop, stop, stooop!!"
The next moment.

I mustered all my strength and tried to snatch the knife from Mom with one go. But for a moment, I lost the balance of power and the knife left my hand... In that gap, Mom began to swing the knife upward.
Shaken off, I lost my balance and fell hard on my backside. And then, Mom swung her arm up too hard... and the blade of the knife cut into her neck...
Blood started bursting out like a fountain... from Mom's neck...

I felt like I could hear Mom screaming, but... the sound didn't reach my ears. Her face warped with agony as her mouth opened like she was screaming something... and then she collapsed... to the floor.
"I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry..."
Even though I shouldn't be hearing anything, I heard a voice that sounded very similar to my own.
No, that's wrong. This is... my voice.
But... that doesn't matter. It doesn't matter... anymore......
Hey... Somebody, tell me.
Where did things start spiraling out of control?
Where did I... where did we go wrong...?
Hey... Please tell me......
Someone, tell me...... please......
"I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry..."
Right there... as if the power had been cut...... my consciousness was swallowed by darkness...
